prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 2692→6092→3056→3072 名。2023 年出现明显位次后移（6092 名），2024 年迅速回升至 3056 名，2025 年基本持平于 3072 名。近两年位次稳定在 3000 名附近，2025 年基准约 3072 名；该校在宁夏理科（物理类）招生计划：2022 年 36 人、2023 年 41 人、2024 年 35 人、2025 年 30 人；2026 年计划 21 人，较 2025 年减少 9 人，缩招约 30%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中央民族大学为 985 工程、211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 100 名持续上升至 2026 年第 79 名，学校综合实力与声誉稳步提升；抖音平台热度排名第 80 位，评价为"一般"，15 条视频综合热度约 29 万，整体曝光处于中等水平，未见明显报考热度异常信号；民族学获评 A+（全国顶尖），中国语言文学 A-、社会学 A-，均为该校传统优势学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，中央民族大学在宁夏物理类投放计算机类、电子信息类等热门专业，可能吸引高分考生关注；宁夏 2026 年高考总人数约 6.6 万人，与 2025 年基本持平，竞争格局总体稳定；学校位于北京市，对宁夏考生属跨省报考，无明显地域偏好优势；该校在宁夏招生规模较小，2025 年物理类计划 30 人，2026 年进一步缩减至 21 人，招生体量有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 3072 名、2026 年物理类计划大幅缩招 30%（使竞争缓解、位次前移）、学校软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）以及考生总数基本稳定等因素；考虑到学校排名提升对报考热度的正向拉动，适度修正后预测 2026 年理科最低录取位次约 2499 名，区间 2049–2949 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 2692 → 6092 → 3056 → 3072. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift in ranking (6092), which quickly recovered to 3056 in 2024, and remained essentially stable at 3072 in 2025. In the past two years, the ranking has stabilized around 3000, with a baseline of about 3072 for 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science (physics category) was: 36 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 21, a decrease of 9 from 2025, a reduction of about 30%, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Minzu University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in overall strength and reputation. On Douyin platform, it ranks 80th in popularity, rated as 'average', with 15 videos having a combined popularity of about 290,000, showing moderate overall exposure and no abnormal signals in application popularity. Ethnology is rated A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, and Sociology A-, all traditional advantageous disciplines that attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. Minzu University of China offers popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information in Ningxia's physics category, which may attract high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Ningxia is about 66,000, essentially unchanged from 2025, keeping the competition landscape stable. The university is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Ningxia candidates, with no obvious regional preference advantage. The university's enrollment scale in Ningxia is small, with 30 physics category spots in 2025 and further reduction to 21 in 2026, limiting the enrollment volume.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3072, the significant 30% reduction in physics category enrollment for 2026 (easing competition and moving ranking forward), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the stable total number of candidates, and taking into account the positive pull of the university's ranking improvement on application popularity, after moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 2499, with a range of 2049–2949.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 2049–2949, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (Computer Science and Electronic Information are the most competitive), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2000), you can focus on reaching for top-tier engineering majors in Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Liberal Arts (History Category) minimum rankings approximately 507→473→1058→940. Rankings were stable around 500 in 2022–2023, significantly dropped to 1058 in 2024, slightly recovered to 940 in 2025, fluctuating in the 900–1050 range in recent two years, with a baseline of about 940 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for Liberal Arts (History Category): 30 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 38 in 2025; 2026 plan 41, an increase of 3 from 2025, an expansion of about 7.9%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking continuously rose from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, steadily enhancing comprehensive strength, increasing attractiveness to candidates; Douyin popularity ranking 80th, rated "average", no abnormal application heat; no negative public opinion about Minzu University of China in reputation files, overall reputation stable; Ethnology A+ (first in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, these advantageous disciplines highly match Liberal Arts enrollment majors (Ethnology, Chinese Language and Literature, Sociology, etc.), strongly attractive to Liberal Arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law category socially hot (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese category hot (recommended), Journalism and Communication category clearly discouraged; Ningxia 2026 total college entrance exam candidates about 66,000, History Category candidates account for about 32.5% (about 21,500), roughly the same as 2025; university located in Beijing, cross-province application for Ningxia candidates; the university's Liberal Arts enrollment scale in Ningxia gradually expanded from 30 in 2022 to 41 in 2026, enrollment share increased, indicating increased emphasis on Ningxia students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 940, the 2026 History Category enrollment expansion of about 7.9% (slightly intensifying competition, pushing rankings back), the university's continuously rising Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the basically stable total number of candidates; taking into account the high match between the university's advantageous disciplines and Liberal Arts majors, and the positive pull of ranking improvement on application heat, after moderate correction, the predicted 2026 Liberal Arts minimum admission ranking is about 1000, with a range of 820–1180.
